title: Operation
description: Describes a single API operation on a path.

__schema0.title: tags
__schema0.description: A list of tags for API documentation grouping.

__schema2.title: summary
__schema2.description: A short summary of the operation. Keep under ~120 characters.

__schema3.title: description
__schema3.description: A verbose description. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema4.title: operationId
__schema4.description: Unique identifier for the operation. Used for code generation.

__schema5.title: parameters
__schema5.description: Parameters for this operation, combined with path-level parameters.

__schema7.title: Reference Object
__schema7.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema8.title: Reference
__schema8.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema12.title: summary
__schema12.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema13.title: description
__schema13.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema16.title: name
__schema16.description: The name of the parameter. Case-sensitive.

__schema17.title: in
__schema17.description: Location of the parameter. 'path' parameters must have required=true.

__schema18.title: description
__schema18.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema23.description: For query parameters only. Allows empty values (?param=).
__schema23.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema25.title: style
__schema25.description: Serialization style. Defaults vary by 'in': query/cookie='form', path/header='simple'.

__schema26.title: explode
__schema26.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema27.description: For query parameters. When true, allows reserved characters without encoding.
__schema27.title: allowReserved

__schema30.title: Schema Object
__schema30.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema31.title: String Object
__schema31.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema32.title: title
__schema32.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema33.title: description
__schema33.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema34.title: default
__schema34.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema35.title: example
__schema35.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema36.title: enum
__schema36.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema38.title: const
__schema38.description: A constant value that this schema must match.

__schema40.title: Discriminator
__schema40.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema41.title: propertyName
__schema41.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema42.title: mapping
__schema42.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema47.title: XML
__schema47.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema48.title: name
__schema48.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema49.title: namespace
__schema49.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema50.title: prefix
__schema50.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema51.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema51.title: attribute

__schema53.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema53.title: wrapped

__schema57.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema57.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema58.title: description
__schema58.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema59.title: url
__schema59.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema61.title: readOnly
__schema61.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema62.title: writeOnly
__schema62.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema63.title: deprecated
__schema63.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema64.title: nullable
__schema64.description: OpenAPI 3.0: Set to true to allow null values.

__schema66.title: format
__schema66.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema67.title: Pattern
__schema67.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema73.title: Number Object
__schema73.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema75.title: format
__schema75.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema76.title: multipleOf
__schema76.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema78.title: minimum
__schema78.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema80.title: maximum
__schema80.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema82.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema82.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema84.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema84.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema86.title: Integer Object
__schema86.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema88.title: format
__schema88.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema89.title: multipleOf
__schema89.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema91.title: minimum
__schema91.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema93.title: maximum
__schema93.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema95.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema95.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema97.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema97.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema99.title: Boolean Object
__schema99.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema101.title: Array Object
__schema101.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema105.title: prefixItems
__schema105.description: Tuple validation: schemas for items by index (array position).

__schema107.title: contains
__schema107.description: Require the array to contain at least one item matching this subschema.

__schema119.title: Object Object
__schema119.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema143.title: Composition Schema
__schema143.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not) without a type constraint.

__schema144.title: allOf
__schema144.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema146.title: anyOf
__schema146.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema148.title: oneOf
__schema148.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema150.title: not
__schema150.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema153.title: examples
__schema153.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema160.title: externalValue
__schema160.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema162.title: content
__schema162.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema164.title: MediaType
__schema164.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema172.title: Encoding
__schema172.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema173.title: contentType
__schema173.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema176.title: Header
__schema176.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema177.title: Header
__schema177.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema178.title: description
__schema178.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema179.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema179.title: required

__schema181.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema181.title: deprecated

__schema183.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema183.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema185.title: style
__schema185.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema221.title: responses
__schema221.description: REQUIRED. The responses for this operation.

__schema223.title: Response
__schema223.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema224.title: Response
__schema224.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema232.title: Link
__schema232.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema233.title: Link
__schema233.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema234.title: operationId
__schema234.description: The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation, as defined with a unique operationId.

__schema235.title: operationRef
__schema235.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

__schema236.title: parameters
__schema236.description: A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with operationId or identified via operationRef.

__schema239.title: requestBody
__schema239.description: A literal value or {expression} to use as a request body when calling the target operation.

__schema243.title: url
__schema243.description: A URL to the target host. Supports server variables in {braces}. May be relative.

__schema244.title: description
__schema244.description: An optional description of the server.

__schema245.title: variables
__schema245.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema247.title: ServerVariable
__schema247.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema248.title: enum
__schema248.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema250.title: default
__schema250.description: The default value for substitution if not supplied.

__schema251.title: description
__schema251.description: An optional description for the server variable.

__schema258.title: Callback
__schema258.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema259.title: Callback
__schema259.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema261.title: PathItem
__schema261.description: Describes the operations available on a single path.

__schema279.title: deprecated
__schema279.description: Marks this operation as deprecated. Defaults to false.

__schema281.title: security
__schema281.description: Security requirements for this operation. Overrides root-level security.

items.title: SecurityRequirement
items.description: Lists the required security schemes for this operation.
